full_text:
TLS meeting

Ada, Hanna, Zhihan
30.09.2025

#1 - GeoMx

Zhihan

Mature GC: 
Distinctive round or oval GC region, strong expression of CD20
High proliferation of BCL6⁺ Ki67⁺ cells
Network of CD21⁺ follicular dendritic cells (FDCs)
Surrounding T cell zone and high endothelial venule (HEV)

Immature GC:
Relatively clear and large CD20+ B cell aggregation
Some or weak BCL6⁺ cells, rare Ki67⁺ proliferation center
FDCs network (CD21) is discontinuous/weak, and incomplete structure 
Are identified by either GC gene signatures or morphology (images)
Could there be some regressing TLS or post-GC TLS in this group? More macrophages? Apoptosis marker?

Immune Aggregates (Aggs): 
Loose or clustered groups of small lymphocytes, no distinct B-cell/T-cell zones or FDC network. 
Aggs represent early / unstructured immune infiltration.

Group division of Mature GC, Immature GC and Immune Aggregates (Aggs)

Mature GC: BCL6⁺ CD20⁺ CD21⁺ Ki67⁺ surrounding-HEV⁺


Immature GC: BCL6⁺⁻ CD20⁺ CD21⁺⁻ Ki67⁺⁻ surrounding-HEV⁺⁻


Immune Aggregates (Aggs): BCL6⁻ CD20⁺ CD21⁻ Ki67⁻ CD4⁺ CD8a⁺

Group division of Mature GC, Immature GC and Immune Aggregates (Aggs)

Next steps for GeoMx analysis

Normalization + Remove Batch effect for only TLS AOIs
Check quality issues / re-QC / resequencing to recover more TLS AOIs data
Check those relabeled AOIs in the image and see if the new/old labels match with the morphology
R script is uploaded to Github/TLS/GeoMx
a supplementary table for gene signature
ROIs alignment with tcycif cell counts
Differential gene expression / Enrichment analysis
I will first run Iga’s pipeline
Find and check interesting TLS related pathways, key genes / related functions inside
Deconvolution analysis - TLS cell franctions distributions
Spatial pattern recognition
Cell-cell interactions (ligand–receptor analysis)
Any more ideas?

From Iga
